title: Origins: Thistlewing
description: An origin that is superior in flight.
body:
# 🔮 **Thistlewing**

### 1.20.1
### **Impact 2**

_Tame relatives to Phantoms, their wings are more majestic under the night sky._

# List of Powers

<details>
<summary>💨 Lift Off</summary>

You are adorned with uniquely coloured wings, a nice purple. You cannot use these wings on a regular basis; to activate them, press Primary, which will propel you into the air and allow you to glide freely.
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
Your leap replenishes once you land again, meaning you won't be able to glide.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
You cannot glide if you have no hunger.

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>☂️ Hurtle</summary>

Sprinting whilst mid-flight will continuously boost yourself forwards, this is exhausting to do however. Holding the jump while boosting will increase upward velocity.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🦴 Brittle</summary>

You've got two less hearts than the average player.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🧏🏻 Sensitivity</summary>

You are able to use rockets to aid in flight, and you are also unable to fly while wearing a chestplate.
</details>

<details>
<summary>😩 Hefty Plumage</summary>

The weight of your wings makes it hard for you to balance yourself properly on land, thus you travel much slower than others and you cannot sprint.

</details>


# Additional
This is an improvement of Ikaros, Aeratus and Avifauna, i will be putting updates into this and actual work as i like this origin a lot more than those.
